title: Hootsuite Connection with Monday.com
excerpt:
Hello, 
I am trying to connect Hootsuite to our monday.com account. It allows me download the app and it acts like it’s going to connect, but then it times out and doesn’t end up connecting the Hootsuite app to our Monda…

posts.author: EpikaFleet (Kalei)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am trying to connect Hootsuite to our monday.com account. It allows me download the app and it acts like it’s going to connect, but then it times out and doesn’t end up connecting the Hootsuite app to our Monday account.

I have tried multiple times with nothing that works. I also looked at documentation, YT videos and forums. Nothing seems to work. Does Hootsuite still connect to monday.com dashboards?

I’m specifically after pulling analytics and data along with drafting posts when a task is made. Thank you!

posts.author: calinstitute (Rob Onekea)
posts.cookedHtml: Have there been any updates to this or suggestions?

posts.author: Ecosystem_Cail (Cail)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I was just alerted to this post, so I wanted to advise you and Rob about what we have in Hootsuite re: monday

There are two main apps we promote:

  1. Hootsuite in monday–> watch this video. It allows for a bi-directional flow. You can create a post in monday that will be sent to Hootsuite, and edits made will update on either end.

  2. monday in Hootsuite Plan → watch this video. This allows you to access pre-made posts in monday and then create them in Hootsuite, once it is all ready to go. This one does not have a bi-directional flow.

Both are useful apps depending on what you’re looking for.
